case_title: VINCENT PLASTIC INC. VS FONG, SAMUEL W. DBA 32ND & NORIEGA PRODUCE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,903.20 FILED BY VINCENT PLASTIC INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, SAMUEL W. DBA 32ND & NORIEGA PRODUCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
